title: Invincible Pets
description: A survival friendly option to adding invulnerability to pets and other animals.
body:
## Invincible Pets
This mod adds a survival-friendly, vanilla-style way to protect your pets (and other animals) from all types of damage while maintaining a balanced gameplay experience. 

It uses enchanted golden apples to apply invulnerability to animals. Milk buckets can be used to remove the effect. 

While invulnerable, wolves and axolotl will no longer attack passive or hostile mobs, even to defend the player! This ensures you don't have an overpowered super companion at your side during battle.  

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 

## How To Use
Feed any tamed pet an enchanted golden apple. The animal will glow momentarily and emit a sound effect if the invulnerability was successfully applied. 

You can also apply the effect to most other animal mobs by naming them with a nametag first.

Right-click the animal with a milk bucket to remove their invulnerability.

## List of Supported Mobs
### Tamable Animals:
- Cats
- Donkeys
- Horses
- Llamas
- Mules
- Nautilus
- Parrots
- Wolves
  
### Other Animals:
- Armadillos
- Bees
- Camels
- Chickens
- Cows
- Foxes
- Frogs
- Goats
- HappyGhasts
- Ocelots
- Pandas
- Pigs
- Rabbits
- Sheep
- Sniffers
- Striders
- Turtles

At the moment, Polar Bears and Hoglins are not supported due to their hostility toward players. Aquatic creatures are also not supported at the moment. 

Please let me know of any bugs, or if you have suggestions for improvements!
